title: ServerRPExposer
description: Extracts server resource packs when they are sent to the client and are downloaded into a folder within the game directory (usually .minecraft).
body:
### Description
Extracts server resource packs when they are sent to the client and are downloaded into a folder within the game directory (usually .minecraft).

### Usage
When any server sends the client a resource pack, a copy of the pack is saved inside a folder labeled "serverrp_exposer" with a corresponding number. The copied pack is the exact version of the resource pack that the game uses when loading assets.
